channel.title: Blogs on Daniel Alemayehu
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Daniel Alemayehu

item.title: You Should Have A Blog
item.description:
Yo! Hey! Hiya! Thanks for comin’, great to see you!

Without a doubt one of the hardest things to do is to start something. Whether that’s a new homework project, an awesome software idea, an interesting writing article, or even this very blog1. I’ve personally found I have to be weary of getting stuck in a perpetual “ideation loop” where I continually think and think and think about the concept of starting and how I should start as opposed to actually acting on the concept. Or in this case writing (almost all of the progress on this post was made in the last week).
